programmes.show_description: Piers Morgan travels to Lowell Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Rebecca Fenton, found guilty of the brutal murder of her husband.
Piers travels to Homestead Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Amber Wright, who at the age of 15 conspired with a group of friends to murder her ex-boyfriend.
Alex is hit hard by the struggles of patients going through IVF. After a previous miscarriage, Jasmine and Rumen are trying for a second child while Rumen is in remission for cancer.
Nearing the end of her training, Alex is allowed to assist in complex cases. She meets Holly who has a rare split womb and is attempting her sixth round of IVF with her husband Mark.

The hit property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. Carson wants a Nashville pad of her own, but finding the perfect home could be tough.
More amazing property transformations with the Scott twins. The brothers help empty nesters Karen and Rick, who are looking for a deluxe retreat.

Bolton: The team head to Bolton to help the Taylor-Mann family, whose nine-year-old son William has severe autism.
Dexter, Driver & Bailey: Noel treats handsome Dobermann Dexter, who has a serious spinal condition, and feisty feline Driver, who's been hit by a car, resulting in hip and knee injuries.
Moon, Milo & Ollie: Eight-year-old Dalmatian Milo's squashed spinal cord causes him constant pain, and Noel attempts to fuse four-year-old Shih Tzu Ollie's elbow in order to save his leg.
Betsy & Angel: Cockapoo Betsy was hit by a van five months ago and has developed gangrene, while bite-size bijou Dogue de Bordeaux puppy Angel has a genetic deformity.
Piers meets Jennifer Mee, once famous across the world as The Hiccup Girl, and now notorious as a murderer serving life in prison without the possibility of Parole.
Piers travels to Gadsden Correctional Facility to meet Ashley Humphrey, who shot barmaid Sandee Rozzo eight times in 2003 - a crime for which she is now serving 25 years.
There's heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents.
In this emotional final episode, Alex comes to the end of her training at Kings and three couples await their results. Will they finally become parents?

The discovery of underwear on a canal bank sparks a risky missing persons search and a police incident ends in a fleeing car passenger jumping over a wall and breaking his leg.
Heart-warming documentary series recording life on a maternity ward. After spending years in an on-off relationship, Jason and Naomi commit to raising their child together.
